description: Path Prefix Bytes Settings - View and configure the path prefix bytes setting on the radio page with impact analysis

userStories.title: Add API endpoint to read path hash mode from radio
userStories.description: As an operator, I need an API to get the current path hash mode from the radio so the UI can display it.
acceptanceCriteria: Add GET /api/radio/path-mode endpoint to web_viewer/app.py
Call MeshCore get_path_hash_mode() via async operation queue
Return JSON: {path_hash_mode: 0|1|2, prefix_bytes: 1|2|3, status: 'ok'|'error'}
Return appropriate error if radio not connected
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
userStories.notes: Added GET endpoint to app.py (line ~3974), scheduler handler _path_mode_read_op() and operation type registration. Pre-existing test failures unrelated to these changes.

userStories.title: Add API endpoint to write path hash mode to radio
userStories.description: As an operator, I need an API to change the path hash mode on the radio.
acceptanceCriteria: Add POST /api/radio/path-mode endpoint to web_viewer/app.py
Accept JSON body: {path_hash_mode: 0|1|2} or {prefix_bytes: 1|2|3}
Validate input is 0, 1, or 2 (or 1, 2, 3 for prefix_bytes)
Call MeshCore set_path_hash_mode(mode) via async operation queue
Return success/failure status
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Update bot runtime prefix_bytes after radio change
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the bot to use the new prefix_bytes value after it's changed on the radio.
acceptanceCriteria: After successful POST /api/radio/path-mode, update bot.prefix_bytes
Also update bot.prefix_hex_chars = prefix_bytes * 2
Log the change at INFO level: 'Prefix mode changed to N bytes'
New value is used immediately for path parsing without restart
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add API endpoint for path mode impact analysis
userStories.description: As an operator, I need to see how changing prefix bytes would affect stored paths and contacts.
acceptanceCriteria: Add GET /api/radio/path-mode/impact?target=N endpoint (N = 0, 1, or 2)
Query observed_paths table for count where bytes_per_hop != target+1
Query complete_contact_tracking for count where out_bytes_per_hop != target+1
Return JSON: {affected_paths: N, affected_contacts: N, sample_contacts: [...]}
Limit sample_contacts to 10 names
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create Advanced Settings card structure on radio page
userStories.description: As an operator, I want to see advanced radio settings in a dedicated section.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'Advanced Settings' card below Radio Parameters card in radio.html
Card uses consistent styling with existing cards (Bootstrap card)
Card includes header with icon and 'Read from Device' button
Card body has placeholder div for path mode settings
Card shows loading state while fetching settings
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Display current path mode in Advanced Settings card
userStories.description: As an operator, I want to see the current path prefix bytes value with clear explanation.
acceptanceCriteria: On page load, call GET /api/radio/path-mode to fetch current value
Display label 'Path Prefix Size' with current value: '1 byte (2 hex chars)' etc
Include brief explanation text below the value
Show 'Unknown' or 'N/A' when radio is disconnected
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add path mode selector dropdown
userStories.description: As an operator, I want to select a different path prefix size to change routing.
acceptanceCriteria: Add dropdown/select with options: '1 byte (2 hex)', '2 bytes (4 hex)', '3 bytes (6 hex)'
Current radio value is pre-selected on load
Selector is disabled when radio is disconnected
Selection change triggers impact analysis fetch
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Display impact analysis when selection changes
userStories.description: As an operator, I want to see how many contacts and paths would be affected before changing.
acceptanceCriteria: When dropdown selection differs from current value, call impact API
Display impact summary: 'X paths and Y contacts use different prefix width'
Show warning icon with yellow/orange styling when impact > 0
List up to 5 affected contact names as examples
Hide impact section when selection matches current value
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add confirmation modal for path mode change
userStories.description: As an operator, I want to confirm before changing path prefix size to avoid accidents.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'Write to Device' button that triggers Bootstrap confirmation modal
Modal shows current value and new value clearly
Modal displays impact summary (paths/contacts affected count)
Modal includes warning text about mesh routing implications
Modal has 'Cancel' and 'Confirm Change' buttons
Button is disabled when selection equals current value
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement path mode write with feedback
userStories.description: As an operator, I want to save my path mode change and see confirmation.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'Confirm Change' calls POST /api/radio/path-mode
Show spinner/loading state while operation in progress
Poll operation status (follow existing channel operation pattern)
Show success toast notification on completion
Show error toast if write fails with error message
Refresh displayed value after successful write
Close modal on success
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Show path mode mismatch warning indicator
userStories.description: As an operator, I want to be warned if stored paths use a different prefix width than current setting.
acceptanceCriteria: After reading current path mode, check if any paths have different bytes_per_hop
If mismatch exists, show warning badge next to current value
Warning text: 'Some stored paths use different prefix width'
Clicking warning shows count breakdown by bytes_per_hop
Use Bootstrap popover or collapse for details
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add unit tests for path mode API endpoints
userStories.description: As a developer, I need tests to verify the path mode API endpoints work correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Create tests for GET /api/radio/path-mode endpoint
Create tests for POST /api/radio/path-mode endpoint
Create tests for GET /api/radio/path-mode/impact endpoint
Test validation of invalid input values
Test error handling when radio disconnected
All tests pass
